name: Blue Hills Golf Club
address: 2002 Blue Hills Cir NE, Roanoke, VA 24012
about: Blue Hills Golf Club is an 18-hole championship course in Roanoke, VA, offering a challenging yet enjoyable experience for golfers of all skill levels. The course plays to a par 71 with approximately 6,453 yards, featuring a 70.1 rating and 120 USGA slope from the championship tees. The facility includes a full-service restaurant and bar, a driving range with grass tees and turf mats, and an on-site golf shop. While the primary offering is traditional outdoor golf, the website references a booking system for tee times and indicates a focus on providing a comprehensive golf club experience for the local community.
why_golfers_like_it: Challenging yet playable course suitable for all skill levels
Comprehensive facility with on-course amenities like a full-service bar and grill
Driving range available for practice with both grass and turf mat options
Professional lessons available for skill development

food_and_drink.notes: Restaurant service available with a full kitchen

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you will need to bring your own golf equipment to play the course.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The venue has a full-service bar and grill available on-site.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Standard play time for 18 holes is not specified, but plan for a typical round duration based on the course's par 71 layout.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the course is described as enjoyable for all skill levels, including beginners.
